case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. SEBASTIAN STEVEN EASY et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EASY, SEBASTIAN STEVEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 805 ELLSWORTH ST. S.F. CA., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT EASY, SEBASTIAN STEVEN
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ON DEFENDANT EASY, SEBASTIAN STEVEN

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED JAN-26-2003, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT EASY, SEBASTIAN STEVEN
